name: CRYPTO-TITAN
tagline: BTC + ETH Timing Strategy with 21-Model Conviction Ensemble
description: BTC + ETH + cash timing strategy. Tradable universe: BTC and ETH only (max 2 simultaneous positions). Signal universe: 50 coins (35 survivors + 15 explicitly-dead) used for breadth signals, master gate, and survivorship-bias robustness. The 21 models decide weekly: hold BTC, hold ETH, hold both, or stay in cash. Conviction-scaled leverage (1× → 3.2×) executed via Hyperliquid perpetuals or OKX leveraged tokens. Alt-trading sleeves were tested empirically and dropped — daily-bar alt momentum picks parabolic alts right before they reverse.
